description: An exploration geologist analyzes data from a soil sampling survey to identify anomalies that could indicate buried mineralization.

nodes.task_description: Import the soil sample locations and their assay results (e.g., copper, gold concentrations) into a GIS software.

expected_outcome.value: The geochemical data is loaded and displayed on a map.

nodes.task_description: Perform a statistical analysis of the data to define what constitutes an anomalous result (e.g., anything above the 95th percentile).

expected_outcome.value: A threshold for anomalous values is determined.

nodes.task_description: Create a contour map of the copper concentrations to visualize the size and shape of the anomalies, identifying targets for follow-up work.

expected_outcome.value: A map is generated that clearly shows several coherent anomalies worthy of further investigation.
